images.alt: A nun standing ankle-deep in a flooded cathedral at midnight, holding a lantern filled with black butterflies instead of light. Her habit is pristine, but the reflection beneath her shows something ancient wearing the same face. Stained-glass saints loom above her, cracked and glowing faintly, while pale lilies drift across the water like tiny funerals. Sacred, surreal, gothic, eerie but graceful, cinematic lighting, high-detail fabric, quiet dread, beautiful composition, dreamlike religious symbolism.

images.alt: A strange, cinematic portrait of a nun in an impossible convent where the sacred and surreal quietly blur together. She stands in a moonlit stone hallway lined with flickering votive candles, but each candle flame contains a tiny floating eye. Her habit is traditional black and white, yet subtly ornate, with embroidered constellations and small silver keys sewn into the veil. Around her, the walls are covered in old devotional paintings whose figures have turned to look directly at her. Calm, eerie, reverent, slightly unsettling, gothic atmosphere, soft film grain, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, elegant composition, weird but beautiful, not horror-gory.

images.alt: ull-body, head-to-toe high-glam cyberpunk editorial portrait of a solemn futuristic ceremonial figure, nun-adjacent but not actual clergy, standing or seated in a strong centered pose against a saturated crimson studio backdrop. Calm direct gaze, composed shoulders, controlled posture, devotional stillness, iconic fashion-poster presence. Styling evokes a cyberpunk convent motif through a sharp structured collar, dark narrow tie, sleek uniform silhouette, ceremonial symmetry, austere elegance, and restrained black-chrome layering, without using an actual habit, veil, cross, rosary, or religious garment. Reflective chrome long-sleeve button-up shirt with sharp collar, dark fitted tie, high-waisted fitted bottoms, wide belt with polished metal buckle, metallic gloves, rounded armored knee elements, glossy black accents, sculptural shoulder details, subtle tactical straps, polished hardware. Structured voluminous hair with blunt bangs and sculpted curled lengths, glossy editorial makeup, luminous facial highlights, glossy lips, calm focused intensity. Diagonal sword-like prop or ceremonial blade silhouette behind the subject, glowing petal-like fragments floating through the scene like synthetic blossoms or digital stained glass. Dramatic studio lighting with intense specular highlights, cool blue-white reflections across chrome fabric, deep black shadows, saturated red-pink background glow, sleek reflective textures, high contrast, clean anime linework, cyberpunk fashion illustration, futuristic uniform styling, cinematic poster composition, vibrant color grading, sharp detail, subtle bloom, polished glossy finish, editorial drama.

Your 5-Minute Reality Check: Open your AI tool right now. Type this: Explain compound interest like you're a skeptical personal trainer who hates financial jargon and talks like you just finished a set of deadlifts. Then compare it to a generic prompt. You'll hear the difference immediately.

Go Forward: Stop treating AI like a black box with a mind of its own. You're the one holding the clipboard. Write the workout plan. (3/4)

record.text: The Truth: You absolutely can shape how AI sounds and thinks. Think of it like training a new employee at the gym. You wouldn't just say do some exercises and walk away. You'd say show me three compound movements for chest, keep it simple, no fancy equipment. Same with AI. Tell it to sound like […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText: The Truth: You absolutely can shape how AI sounds and thinks. Think of it like training a new employee at the gym. You wouldn't just say do some exercises and walk away. You'd say show me three compound movements for chest, keep it simple, no fancy equipment. Same with AI. Tell it to sound like a tired coach giving advice at 6am. Tell it to be blunt. Tell it to avoid metaphors. The AI follows your lead. It doesn't have a fixed personality waiting to escape. (2/4)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.text: This is why if you're against genAI, it's important to research. People would rather lie and gaslight, than be honest about their use of generativeAI.

value.text:
Goblin Cleanup
Crisalu Games. NO disclosure, handmade art retouched by Unity Muse. Unity Muse was essentially Unity's inhouse Gen AI model, which has since been replaced with a larger model and takes from external sources. These images from the game have also been replaced. -y

images.alt: Goblin Cleanup steam store image
in-game shot of a framed generated "art" with red circles over the parts telling of gen-ai. its of a castle over a cliff at the ocean

"Paintings in the staff room seem to be AI art
I'm unsure what the model used for this art were, but I took a screenshot of one of the paintings in the staff room for the first level, and my AI art sense went off. Getting a closer look revealed some very AI art looking artifacts, and of course there is ethically trained AI, and if you have trained an AI on your own company's art that's perfectly fine, but either way Steam does require you to tell when your game uses generative AI like this, and where it is used. I personally really like this game as I love Viscera Cleanup but realize it is a very dated game (even when it was new, imo) and I love the idea of procedurally generated dungeons you have to clean especially as a cute goblin maid! So I really would love to have full details and clarity on the (what appears to be) AI art use in the painting decorations in this game. Thank you devs in advance."

DEV: "Hi! The images in the Staff room are not made by AI, they are hand drawn by layers and we use Unity Muse to refine them and place them in the game, it saves time and work and for a small team of 3 people it matters a lot. The image you shared had some small errors that make you think it's AI, but it's not, it was simply retouched by Muse. If you want I can share the psd file with the layers."

Is Unity AI the same as Unity Muse?

No. Unity Muse is a deprecated product offering which featured Unity first-party models, while Unity AI is a new product utilizing third party models
Goblin Cleanup steam store image

Getting a closer look revealed some very AI art looking artifacts, and of course there is ethically trained AI, and if you have trained an AI on your own company's art that's perfectly fine, but either way Steam does require you to tell when your game uses generative AI like this, and where it is used. I personally really like this game as I love Viscera Cleanup but realize it is a very dated game (even when it was new, imo) and I love the idea of procedurally generated dungeons you have to clean especially as a cute goblin maid! So I really would love to have full details and clarity on the (what appears to be) AI art use in the painting decorations in this game. Thank you devs in advance."

DEV: "Hi! The images in the Staff room are not made by AI, they are hand drawn by layers and we use Unity Muse to refine them and place them in the game, it saves time and work and for a small team of 3 people it matters a lot. The image you shared had some small errors that make you think it's AI, but it's not, it was simply retouched by Muse. If you want I can share the psd file with the layers."

Is Unity AI the same as Unity Muse?

No. Unity Muse is a deprecated product offering which featured Unity first-party models, while Unity AI is a new product utilizing third party models

ねえ知ってる？中国語の「的・地・得」って全部「de ドゥ」って読むのに、使い方が全然違うんだよ🤯 AIの翻訳ツールが普及した今でも、ここ間違えると「あ、機械っぽいな」ってバレちゃうポイントなんだって！日本語の「ず/づ」「は/わ」みたいな感じかな〜。99%の日本人が使い間違えてるって聞いて…正直わたしもちょっと不安になってきた笑 一緒に確認しようよ🌺

مثل جوجل من خلال استقطاب هذه العقول الفذة؟

شاركونا توقعاتكم في التعليقات 👇

#الذكاء_الاصطناعي #AI #Anthropic #GoogleDeepMind #تكنولوجيا

تدور خلف الكواليس بين مختبرات الذكاء الاصطناعي الكبرى.

يبدو أن القوة الحقيقية في هذا العصر لم تعد تكمن في حجم الشركة أو ميزانيتها بل في العقول التي تدير هذه الابتكارات والقدرة على جذبها وتوفير البيئة المناسبة لها.

برأيكم هل تنجح الشركات الناشئة مثل Anthropic في سحب البساط من تحت أقدام العمالقة

النموذج الذي أحدث ثورة في علم الأحياء بقدرته على توقع البنية ثلاثية الأبعاد للبروتينات بناء على تسلسلاتها الجينية وهو الإنجاز الذي منحه جائزة نوبل في الكيمياء لعام 2024.

المثير للاهتمام أن هذه المغادرة تأتي في توقيت حساس حيث شهدنا أيضاً انتقال Noam Shazeer إلى OpenAI مما يشير إلى حرب مواهب شرسة
